questions.questionText: What consensus mechanism does IOTA use to achieve transaction finality?

answerOptions.answerText: Delegated Proof-of-Stake (dPoS) combined with the Mysticeti BFT protocol

questions.questionText: What is the main responsibility of the Consensus Committee in IOTA?

answerOptions.answerText: To propose new validator sets every epoch
To execute the consensus protocol and finalize transactions

questions.questionText: Which of the following is a key feature of the Mysticeti consensus protocol?

answerOptions.answerText: Uses Proof-of-Work to secure the network
Relies on a central coordinator for block approvals
Allows parallel block proposals by multiple validators
Requires six rounds of voting for transaction finality

questions.questionText: How are validators selected to join the Consensus Committee in IOTA?

answerOptions.answerText: By random selection from all full nodes
Based on delegated stake from token holders
Via centralized assignment from the IOTA Foundation
